steps.title: Identify the controlling goal
steps.content: The student's stated objective is to “emphasize a difference” between the organisms' behaviors. This means the answer must present both jellyfish and black dragonfish in a way that highlights their contrasting purposes.

steps.title: Match the choice that shows the contrast
steps.content: Choice D does exactly this with “whereas” — it contrasts their purposes directly: startle predators versus locate prey. Choices A and C discuss shared mechanisms or general facts, and Choice B names only one organism. That matches choice D — D is correct.
